tasks.title: Add new comparison.* i18n sub-keys in es/en/pt
tasks.description: Extend the existing comparison.* namespace in packages/i18n/src/locales/{es,en,pt}/accommodations.json with the NEW keys the redesign introduces: mode toggle label + banner text, contextual card button add/remove states (Agregar/Agregado), bar 'N de M' counter + empty-slot + guidance subtitle + 'Ver comparación' CTA, matrix 'Resaltar diferencias' toggle + best-value label, mobile scroll hint, and the detail-page 'Agregar a comparación' button states. Reuse pre-existing keys where they fit (comparison.bar.count_*, comparison.button.*). Tests: source-assert that every new key exists in all three locales (add to the comparison i18n presence test).

subtasks.title: Add contextual button + bar counter/guidance keys
Add matrix diff-toggle + best-value + mobile hint + detail button keys
Extend i18n presence test to assert new keys

tasks.title: Add compare-mode state to compare-store
tasks.description: Extend apps/web/src/store/compare-store.ts with a client-side compare mode: mode:boolean state, setMode/toggleMode, subscribed via useSyncExternalStore (same pub/sub pattern as selection). Scope persistence to /alojamientos/*: mode turns OFF when leaving the accommodation section (do NOT persist mode across sections; selection persistence stays unchanged in localStorage). Keep getServerSnapshot SSR-safe (mode false). Tests (unit, apps/web/test/store/compare-store*.test): toggle flips mode, mode default false on SSR, mode clears on section-leave signal, selection persistence untouched.

subtasks.title: Add mode state + toggle/set + subscribe wiring
Scope mode to /alojamientos/* (clear on leaving section)

tasks.title: Write computeBestValue pure helper
tasks.description: Add a pure helper (apps/web/src/components/shared/compare/computeBestValue.ts or colocated) that, given the compared accommodations, returns which item id(s) hold the best value per comparable row: cheapest price and best (highest) average rating. Handle ties (multiple winners), missing values (no marker), and single-item (no marker). RO-RO, named export, JSDoc. Tests (unit): cheapest wins, highest rating wins, ties return all winners, missing/undefined excluded, single item yields no best value.

tasks.title: Build compare-mode toggle + banner component
tasks.description: New React island: a prominent labeled 'Comparar alojamientos' toggle plus a mode banner ('Modo comparación activo · elegí los alojamientos que querés comparar'), reading/writing compare mode from the store (T-002) and i18n keys (T-001). Placement is next to the ListingPageHeader (decision: NOT inside FilterSidebar). CSS Modules + design tokens, no Tailwind. Tests (component, testing-library): toggle reflects and flips mode; banner shows only when mode ON; a11y (button role, aria-pressed).

subtasks.title: Toggle island wired to store mode
Mode banner (visible only when mode ON)

tasks.title: Wire toggle + banner into all 6 accommodation listing pages
tasks.description: Mount the toggle+banner island (T-004) next to ListingPageHeader on the six accommodation listing index pages: alojamientos/index.astro, tipo/[type]/index.astro, mapa.astro, caracteristicas/[slug]/index.astro, comodidades/[slug]/index.astro, destinos/[slug]/alojamientos/index.astro. NEVER edit the page/[page].astro rewrite shims. Use client:idle/visible consistently. Tests (source-assert): each of the 6 index pages renders the toggle island; shims untouched.

subtasks.title: Mount on caracteristicas + comodidades + destinos listings

tasks.title: CompareButton contextual variant + remove mute icon from card
tasks.description: Add a contextual variant to CompareButton.client.tsx (+ .module.css): 'Agregar' <-> 'Agregado ✓' add/remove state, shown only when compare mode is ON (reads mode from store T-002, i18n T-001). Remove the standalone CompareButton (mute icon) from AccommodationCard.astro's .acc-card__actions column; render the contextual control in the card body (price+CTA row area) gated on mode. Keep event propagation guards (card is a wide <a>). Tests (component): hidden off-mode, add/remove toggles selection, selected affordance; source-assert card no longer has the mute compare icon in actions.

subtasks.title: Remove mute CompareButton from AccommodationCard actions
Render contextual control in card body when mode ON

tasks.title: Redesign CompareBar to educate
tasks.description: Rework CompareBar.client.tsx (+ .module.css): 'Comparás N de M' counter (M from useCompareGuard maxItems), empty slots up to the plan cap, guidance subtitle when exactly 1 selected ('Sumá al menos uno más…'), explicit 'Ver comparación →' CTA disabled below MIN_TO_COMPARE, mobile bottom-anchored above navigation. i18n keys T-001. Tests (component): renders by count (0 hidden / 1 guidance+disabled CTA / N / at-cap), CTA enabled/disabled, mobile anchor class.

subtasks.title: Counter 'N de M' + plan-cap empty slots
Guidance subtitle at count===1 + CTA gating
Component tests by count + CTA state

tasks.title: Desktop matrix: diff-highlight toggle + best-value marker
tasks.description: In ComparisonMatrix.client.tsx (+ .module.css): add a 'Resaltar diferencias' toggle (default ON) that highlights rows whose values differ; add a per-row best-value amber marker for price (cheapest) and rating (best) using computeBestValue (T-003), colored via var(--rating-star) (decision: reuse rating-star token, never hardcode). Turning the toggle off removes diff highlighting but keeps best-value markers. i18n T-001. Tests (component): diff on/off behavior, best-value marker on cheapest price / best rating, markers persist when diff off.

tasks.title: Mobile matrix: sticky attribute column + scroll-snap
tasks.description: Make the ComparisonMatrix mobile-usable: attribute column sticky-left (position:sticky;left:0), accommodation columns in a horizontal-scroll container with scroll-snap-type + scroll-snap-align, best value shown as an amber dot (var(--rating-star)). Headers must not scroll away from their values. Add the mobile scroll hint (i18n T-001). Tests (component/source-assert): sticky class on attribute cells, scroll-snap container present, amber dot renders on best value.

tasks.title: Detail-page direct 'Agregar a comparación' button
tasks.description: Add a direct, always-visible compare button island on the accommodation detail page — in DetailHeader.astro next to FavoriteButton (.detail-header__favorite). No compare mode here (single item): uses useCompareGuard.toggle + store. Button switches 'Agregar a comparación' <-> 'En comparación ✓'; tapping again removes. i18n T-001. Tests (component): toggle add/removes, label switches, upsell/limit outcomes surfaced like CompareButton.

subtasks.title: Detail compare button island (guard-based, no mode)
Mount in DetailHeader.astro next to FavoriteButton

tasks.title: Align MapCardsSidebar compare usage
tasks.description: Update MapCardsSidebar.client.tsx's CompareButton usage to match the new contextual behavior (T-006) for consistency — mode-gated contextual control instead of the always-on standalone mute icon, respecting that the sidebar is already a client component. Tests (component): sidebar compare control follows mode + add/remove.

subtasks.title: Switch sidebar to contextual mode-gated control

tasks.title: Ensure global bar reflects selection on listing + detail
tasks.description: Verify/adjust that the global CompareBar (mounted in ListingLayout.astro) reflects selection built from the detail page: detail uses DefaultLayout (no bar there — the detail button's 'En comparación ✓' is the feedback), but returning to any listing must show the bar already populated. Confirm the store is the single source and the bar picks up detail-added items. Tests (integration/component): add from detail store path -> bar shows item on a listing render.

subtasks.title: Confirm bar mount coverage vs detail (DefaultLayout)
Verify detail-added items surface in bar on listing

tasks.title: Cross-cutting component + source-assert tests
tasks.description: Consolidate the remaining test coverage: AccommodationCard.astro no longer renders the mute compare icon in actions and renders the contextual control gated on mode; i18n comparison.* new keys present in es/en/pt; CompareButton contextual + MapCardsSidebar aligned. AAA pattern, testing-library + astro source-assert. Fill any gaps left by per-feature tasks.

tasks.title: Manual desktop + mobile smoke
tasks.description: Full manual flow, desktop + mobile (iOS Safari + Chrome Android): header toggle -> mode banner -> select cards -> bar 'N de M' -> comparison view diff toggle + best-value -> mobile sticky attribute column + scroll-snap; detail-page 'Agregar a comparación' -> return to listing -> bar reflects selection. Verify no broken horizontal scroll and attribute labels always visible on mobile. Record outcomes.

subtasks.title: Desktop flow (toggle -> banner -> select -> bar -> matrix)
Mobile flow (sticky + scroll-snap, no broken scroll)
Detail add -> bar reflects on listing

tasks.title: Docs + dead-code cleanup
tasks.description: Update apps/web docs / changelog for the redesigned comparison UX; remove dead compare-mute-icon styles/props left over from the old standalone-only usage (CompareButton unused variant paths, AccommodationCard actions styles). Ensure no orphaned i18n keys.
